description: Test history formatting matches DSPy REPLEntry.format() and _format_output behavior. Test truncation at max_history_output_chars with exact marker string. Test code fence stripping/re-adding.

notes.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local
notes.content:
Plan-derived test focus: REPL history formatter.
- Ensure code fences stripped before execution and re-added for history.
- Truncation at `max_history_output_chars` uses DSPy marker string.
- History ordering: prompt + response blocks in sequence.

title: Task 7.5: Test REPL history formatting
